first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The core critique—strong technical skills but a lack of executive leadership and team scaling experience—is consistent. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce new criticisms or themes linked to the demographic change.
